[Unit]
Description=Claude GitHub Bridge Poller
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=jose
ExecStart=/bin/bash /home/jose/claude-poller.sh
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
Created symlink '/etc/systemd/system/multi-user.target.wants/claude-poller.service' → '/etc/systemd/system/claude-poller.service'.
SERVICE_INSTALLED
